news.summary: In Shanghai on May 7, 2025, a major development was announced by China's top fintech firm Qifu Technology (trading on NASDAQ as QFIN and HKEX as 3660) along with Beijing Jiaotong University. Together, they have reached a notable breakthrough with their research paper titled "Leveraging MLLM Embeddings and Attribute Smoothing for Compositional Zero-Shot."
news.headline: Qifu Technology's paper accepted by IJCAI 2025, using MLLM to innovate in fintech; collaboration with Beijing Jiaotong Univ.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there was a positive trend in gross profit across all regions, with Stockholm being a notable contributor. Net sales for January to March 2025 showed a 4 percent increase, reaching SEK 7,049 million compared to SEK 6,792 million in the same period last year. This growth equates to a 3 percent organic increase. Gross profit also saw a 4 percent rise, reaching SEK 2,408 million compared to SEK 2,312 million previously, which represents a 2 percent organic growth. These numbers indicate a robust performance and suggest a healthy business outlook.
news.headline: Sinch AB reports 4% increase in net sales to SEK 7,049m and 4% increase in gross profit to SEK 2,408m in Q1 2025.

news.summary: In Stockholm on May 8, 2025, Truecaller released its interim report for January-March 2025 showcasing a 16% rise in net sales to SEK 496.9 million from SEK 427.2 million. The company, a prominent global platform specializing in contact verification and spam communication prevention, highlighted growth across all revenue sources.
news.headline: Truecaller reports 16% increase in net sales to SEK 496.9 million (427.2) for Q1 2025, strong growth in revenues.

news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S is seeking FDA approval for its oral version of the obesity drug Wegovy, with CEO Lars Fruergaard highlighting during a recent earnings call that the pill shows similar safety and efficacy to the injectable form. If approved, this oral weight loss drug will be the first of its kind in the U.S. market, being a GLP-1 treatment for obesity. The company aims to capitalize on being the first to market with a known molecule and proven efficacy and safety, carving out a significant position in the obesity treatment segment. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Novo Nordisk's 'Wegovy in a pill' shows '16.6%' average weight loss with over '20%' for one-third of adults struggling with obesity. CEO highlights potential FDA approval for first oral GLP-1 treatment in the US.

news.summary: Bitcoin is expected to break past $100,000 and potentially hit a new all-time high as US President Donald Trump is set to announce a trade deal with the UK. Trump's post on May 7 hinted at a major trade deal with the UK, causing Bitcoin to rise from $97,759 to $99,140. This rally is attributed to speculation surrounding the trade deal, with experts like Neil Jacobs and Anthony Pompliano believing it could lead to new record highs. Bitcoin last reached $100,000 on Feb. 1 and has seen significant growth, with $96 million in short positions liquidated due to a 3% increase over the past 24 hours. The Crypto & Fear Index shows a "Greed" score of 65, indicating bullish sentiment in the market. Readers are advised to conduct their own research before making any investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin is closing in on $100K amid anticipation of a new all-time high after Trump hints at a trade deal with the UK. BTC currently priced at $99,140 per CoinMarketCap, expect new highs soon. Market sentiment is bullish, $96 million in short positions liquidated.

news.summary: According to analysis from Decrypt, traders are viewing a potential safety net for cryptocurrencies akin to a "Trump put." However, analysts caution that the current rally may face challenges if there is a lack of concrete policy implementation.
news.headline: Bitcoin surges to new highs, approaching $100K milestone. Traders cautious due to lack of policy implementation.

news.headline: Nykredit Realkredit Group releases Q1 2025 interim reports for Nykredit A/S (CVR no 12 71 92 48) and Nykredit Realkredit A/S (CVR no 12 71 92 80).

news.summary: Tickets are currently available for purchase for the HERO ESPORTS Asian Champions League (ACL) Grand Finals 2025 in Shanghai. The event is set to occur from May 16 to May 18, 2025, establishing Shanghai as the esports hub of Asia. The lineup of partners for the tournament has also been revealed.
news.headline: HERO ESPORTS ACL Grand Finals 2025 in Shanghai from May 16-18. Tickets on sale, event to transform city into esports epicenter.

news.summary: Aker Horizons ASA, a Norwegian company specializing in green energy and industry development, revealed its first quarter 2025 outcomes today. The company reported a net capital employed of NOK 4.3 billion for this period, showcasing a decline of NOK 1.7 billion from the previous quarter.
news.headline: Aker Horizons ASA announced Q1 2025 results with net capital at NOK 4.3 billion, down NOK 1.7 billion.

news.summary: The latest report reveals that there has been a significant increase in COVID-19 cases in the past week, with a total of 10,000 new cases reported. The surge in infections has led to a spike in hospitalizations, with 500 new admissions in the last five days. Health officials are concerned about the rapid spread of the virus and are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to curb the rising numbers. This surge comes at a critical time as hospitals are already operating at 90% capacity, putting a strain on the healthcare system.
news.headline: Deutsche Bank strengthens defense finance with new team for deals.
Barclays upgrades growth stocks to neutral in Europe.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.8% in the last month, marking a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.2%. The number of new jobs created in the same period totaled 250,000, contributing to the overall economic growth. Additionally, the average hourly wages have also seen a slight increase of 2.5%, indicating a positive trend in the labor market. These figures highlight a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to recover from the challenges posed by the pandemic.
news.headline: Indian insurers are reportedly seeking relaxed rules for bond forwards to address market volatility.

news.summary: Stock Exchange Release by Kojamo plc on May 8, 2025 at 8.00 a.m. EEST in Helsinki revealed positive results for the Interim Report covering the period from January 1 to March 31, 2025. The report highlighted a notable acceleration in the occupancy rate improvement during the first quarter of the year. The detailed information regarding these developments and financial figures can be found within the full report.
news.headline: Kojamo plc's Interim Report Q1 2025: improved occupancy rates. Helsinki, May 8, 2025 - Release at 8.00 a.m. EEST.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the stock market experienced a significant rise of 500 points today, reaching a record high of 30,000 points. This surge has been attributed to positive economic indicators and upbeat investor sentiment. Additionally, unemployment rates have decreased by 2% in the past month, with only 5% of the population currently jobless. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook of the economy and predict further growth in the coming months.
news.headline: Deutsche Bank strengthens defense finance with new deals team, as reported by Bloomberg.

news.summary: A bill to create a "Texas Strategic Bitcoin Reserve" has been passed by a Texas House Committee with a 9-4 vote along party lines. The bill, Senate Bill 21, previously passed the Texas Senate with a 25-5 vote and now awaits a full floor vote before going to the governor's desk. The reserve would be controlled by the state's comptroller and would allow investments in digital assets with a market cap of at least $500 billion, currently only including Bitcoin. If successful, Texas Governor Greg Abbott, who has expressed interest in making Texas the "crypto capital" of the US, would sign the bill into law. The news comes as Arizona Governor signed a similar bill into law to establish a Bitcoin and Digital Asset Reserve Fund, using unclaimed crypto without taxpayer or state funds. Other states like New Hampshire have also passed laws allowing investments in cryptocurrencies with a market cap of over $500 billion, while Florida removed two Bitcoin reserve bills recently. The fate of the Texas bill should be determined before June 2.
news.headline: Texas House committee approves Republican-backed Bitcoin reserve bill, advances to full floor vote: 9-4 committee vote, 25-5 Senate vote. Governor approval pending. Other states also introducing similar bills.

news.summary: In Norway's capital, Oslo, on May 8, 2025, Photocure ASA (OSE: PHO) disclosed a revenue of NOK 125.3 million for Hexvix®/Cysview® in the initial quarter of 2025, showing an increase from NOK 116.8 million in Q1 of 2024. The company also reported an EBITDA of NOK 1.8 million, a decline from NOK 7.9 million in the previous year. Photocure is anticipating a rise in product revenue moving forward.
news.headline: Photocure ASA reports Q1 2025 revenue of NOK 125.3 million for Hexvix®/Cysview®, EBITDA of NOK 1.8 million.

news.summary: Tripledot Studios, a rapidly expanding mobile game developer, has acquired AppLovin’s mobile games studio portfolio for about $800 million. The transaction, consisting of a mix of cash and equity, will make AppLovin a minority stakeholder in Tripledot Studios. This deal enables Tripledot Studios to enhance its presence in crucial markets such as the US and Asia. Following the completion of the acquisition, Tripledot Studios is set to further bolster its operations in the global mobile gaming industry.
news.headline: Tripledot Studios acquires AppLovin's games portfolio for $800 million, becoming a multi-billion dollar global games powerhouse.

news.summary: In Dubai, Smiths Detection, a leading provider of threat detection technologies, has secured a contract from Dubai Aviation Engineering Projects (DAEP) to supply cutting-edge checkpoint screening solutions for all terminals at Dubai International Airport (DXB). This development signifies a major progression in improving security measures and elevating the overall passenger journey at one of the globe's most bustling airports. This partnership is set to enhance security protocols and streamline operations at DXB.
news.headline: Smiths Detection wins contract to provide cutting-edge checkpoint screening technology for DXB, enhancing security at the airport.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in the year 2021. This marks a significant increase of 6% compared to the previous year. The data also shows that China, the United States, and the European Union contributed to more than half of this total, with China being the largest emitter. The report highlights the urgent need for countries to take immediate and effective actions to curb carbon emissions and mitigate the impacts of climate change.
news.headline: Federal Reserve meeting discusses stagflation; importance downplayed despite rising inflation at 4.2%, while job growth at 266,000.

news.summary: In Zhubei, Taiwan, on May 8, 2025, ERS electronic, a top provider of thermal management solutions for semiconductor production, revealed the launch of its newest demonstration center. The state-of-the-art facility aims to serve chipmakers and OSATs by showcasing cutting-edge technologies and strategies for enhancing manufacturing processes. This announcement signifies ERS electronic's commitment to innovation and collaboration within the industry.
news.headline: ERS electronic opens new demonstration center in Zhubei, Taiwan to meet demand for panel-level packaging.

news.summary: ENNOVI has introduced a patent-pending busbar sealing technology in Singapore on May 8, 2025. This innovative solution aims to prevent coolant leaks, providing improved manufacturing efficiency and design flexibility compared to conventional methods. As a mobility electrification solutions partner, ENNOVI offers this cutting-edge technology to enhance the performance and reliability in the industry.
news.headline: ENNOVI introduces ENNOVI-SealTech with patent-pending busbar sealing tech to prevent coolant leaks in EV drivetrains.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Wego, the top travel app and largest online travel marketplace in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA), announced a partnership with the Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) with the aim of rejuvenating interest in one of the most beloved Asian destinations among the regional audience.
news.headline: Wego and TAT collaborate to promote tourism in Thailand from MENA region, aiming to boost travel interest.

news.summary: Pharming Group N.V., based in Leiden, the Netherlands, has released its preliminary unaudited financial report for the first quarter of 2025. The report covers the three months ending on March 31, 2025. Pharming is listed on Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol PHARM and on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PHAR.
news.headline: Pharming Group N.V. releases Q1 2025 financial report, showing preliminary unaudited results for March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Oslo, Norway on May 8, 2025 - Zelluna, a leading company (OSE: ZLNA) specializing in allogeneic T Cell Receptor based Natural Killer (TCR-NK) cells for treating cancer, has released its first quarter financial results for 2025.
news.headline: Zelluna ASA in Oslo reported first quarter 2025 financial results, focusing on TCR-NK cells for cancer treatment.

news.summary: The Estonian construction market seems to be stabilizing, with the Infrastructure segment benefiting from work related to Rail Baltica, despite decreasing investments by the Transport Administration. The Buildings segment shows signs of revival with increased private sector orders. In the first quarter of 2025, the group’s revenue saw a 15% decrease compared to the same period last year, mainly due to a decline in the Buildings segment. The group’s gross margin remained at 4.6%, with profit coming from the Buildings segment while the Infrastructure segment recorded a loss. The order book as of March 31, 2024, saw a 43% increase, attributed to contracts for Rail Baltica in the Infrastructure segment. The stability is reflected in the group’s results, but the impact of new contracts on revenue will be seen gradually.
news.headline: Estonian construction market stabilizes, driven by Rail Baltica projects. Group's Q1 2025 revenue drops by 15% but new contracts signed. Infrastructure segment sees loss. Order book increases by 43%.

news.summary: As of May 8, 2025, Scatec disclosed that in the initial quarter, they generated NOK 2.39 billion (1.23 billion) in proportionate revenues, alongside an EBITDA of NOK 1.38 billion (0.85 billion).
news.headline: Scatec's Q1 2025: Proportionate revenues of NOK 2.39B (1.23B) and EBITDA of NOK 1.38B (0.85B). Growth outlook strong.

news.summary: In Oslo, Norway on May 8, 2025, TGS has awarded the third portion of Performance Stock Units (PSUs) as part of the Magseis 2022 Long-term Incentive Plan. This plan was approved by the Board of Directors of TGS ASA back in 2023.
news.headline: TGS grants third tranche of PSUs under 2022 Long-term Incentive Plan authorized in 2023 by the Board of Directors.

news.summary: Lochem, May 8, 2025 - ForFarmers CEO Pieter Wolleswinkel provided a positive trading update for Q1 2025. The company saw growth in compound feed volumes during the quarter, aligning with their strategy to retain customers and increase market share. Operational profitability also saw a significant increase, continuing the upward trend from the previous year. The integration of Van Triest's activities progressed as planned, leading to a substantial rise in co-product volumes in line with sustainability goals. The German joint venture with team agrar commenced in the first quarter, while in the UK, the second plant sale was finalized in early April. Wolleswinkel expressed pride in the company's employees for their dedication to developing a sustainable food system in Europe.
news.headline: ForFarmers N.V. reports positive trend in Q1 2025 with volume growth and strong profitability.CEO Pieter Wolleswinkel highlights compound feed volume growth, operational profitability increase, and progress in integrating Van Triest's activities. German joint venture started, UK plant sale completed. CEO praises employees for working towards a future-proof food system in Europe.

news.summary: ZURICH, May 8, 2025 - Adecco has shown strong performance in market share with impressive margins. Despite a 2% decrease in revenues year-over-year, there was a 3% increase quarter-over-quarter. Adecco outperformed the markets, boasting relative revenue growth that was notably strong at +130 basis points. By Global Business Unit, Adecco experienced a 1% decline year-over-year, driven by a significant growth in the Asia-Pacific region at +11% and in the Americas at +4%. However, Akkodis witnessed an 8% decrease in revenues during the year. These results indicate a successful execution that has led to market share gains for Adecco.
news.headline: Adecco Group's Q1 2025 results show -2% yoy revenues, +3% qoq, led by APAC +11% and Americas +4%. Market share gains and solid margins.

news.summary: In Qingdao, China on May 8, 2025, Haier, a top household appliances brand globally, made an announcement regarding their newest television line, the M80 series of 4K Mini-LED TVs. This series, developed in collaboration with KEF, a renowned audio technology brand, aims to set new standards in home entertainment.
news.headline: Haier launches new 4K Mini-LED TV M80 series globally, co-engineered with KEF, renowned for audio technology.

news.summary: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA is set to announce its Q1 2025 results on May 15 at Continental Hotel, Stortingsgata 24/26 in Oslo at 08:00 CET. For those unable to attend in person, the event can be live-streamed in Norwegian, and questions can be submitted online at https://www.leroyseafood.com/no/investor/.
news.headline: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA to reveal Q1 2025 results on May 15 in Oslo with 08:00 CET presentation. Live broadcast available.

news.summary: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman is optimistic about the state of inflation in the economy, suggesting it has largely dissipated. He foresees global economic tensions settling in six to nine months and is recommending a temporary halt on China tariffs to safeguard American businesses. Ackman, the CEO of Pershing Square Capital Management, highlighted decreasing energy and food prices as indicators of positive economic developments. Recent financial data shows a complex scenario, with a surprising 0.3% contraction in U.S. Gross Domestic Product in Q1 2025 - the first drop since mid-2022. Meanwhile, April saw an increase of 177,000 nonfarm payrolls. For further details, the whole article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bill Ackman predicts global tensions may ease in 6-9 months, favors pausing China tariffs to aid US businesses and notes decline in energy and food prices. U.S. GDP contracted by 0.3% in Q1 2025, nonfarm payrolls up by 177,000 in April.

news.summary: Kenya has implemented a rise in payroll taxes as part of efforts to sustain government operations and settle the nation's debts to foreign creditors. The tax increase is a key component of a critical strategy to maintain financial stability and honor obligations to external lenders.
news.headline: Payroll taxes in Kenya burden salaried workers, adding to debt struggles as the government aims to manage its finances.
